message:
fix(server/disk_monitor): remove unsafe malloc_trim violating #![forbid(unsafe_code)] (br-j69zs)

Commit 09077180 added `unsafe { nix::libc::malloc_trim(0); }` behind
cfg(target_os = "linux"), but the server crate (and this module) both
carry #![forbid(unsafe_code)]. Remove the call entirely — the memory
pressure transition is still logged for observability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
